title: acourtia huajuapana var. actinomorpha
intro: Acourtia huajuapana var. actinomorpha, a plant species native to Mexico, is a member of the daisy family and is also known as Huajauapan daisy. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Acourtia huajuapana var. actinomorpha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves making a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
